creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/page.cgi?id=fields.html#version>

Availability of installation images for 13.1-PRERELEASE was announced on 2022-02-24 – 
<https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-snapshots/2022-February/000060.html>. 

releng/13.1 branch was created a few hours ago – 
<https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?h=releng/13.1&id=ad329796bdb29c69bce610ad332d08257d7157ac>

I assume that 13.1-RELEASE can be added to Bugzilla some time soon. Thanks. 

----

Comparison: bug 233536 shows 12.0-RELEASE added to Bugzilla (2018-11-26) prior to the release announcement (2018-12-11).
